entity_evidence.text: The amount appropriated by this appropriation includes the unexpended and unobligated balance on June 30, 2025, of the statutory designated program receipts from the seafood marketing assessment (AS 16.51.120) and other statutory designated program receipts of the Alaska Seafood Marketing Institute.
